metadata.name: Inexorable Tide triggers Proliferate when controller casts a spell
metadata.description: P1 controls Inexorable Tide on the battlefield. P2 has 1 poison counter from a prior turn. P1 casts Lightning Bolt targeting P2. Inexorable Tide's WheneverYouCastSpell trigger fires (CR 603.2/603.3) and goes on the stack above Lightning Bolt (LIFO, CR 405.5). All players pass: Proliferate resolves first — P2 (the only player with a counter) gains 1 additional poison counter per CR 701.34a — P2 now has 2 poison counters. All players pass again: Lightning Bolt resolves, dealing 3 damage to P2 (40→37). Final state: P2 at 37 life, 2 poison counters; stack empty; Lightning Bolt in P1 graveyard.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 701.34a: Proliferate — choose any number of permanents and/or players that have a counter, give each one additional counter of each kind already there. P2 has 1 poison counter = eligible. Inexorable Tide card #109 in definitions.rs: {3}{U}{U} Enchantment, AbilityDefinition::Triggered { trigger_condition: TriggerCondition::WheneverYouCastSpell { during_opponent_turn: false }, effect: Effect::Proliferate }. Two harness fixes applied: (1) enrich_spec_from_def now wires TriggerCondition::WheneverYouCastSpell to TriggerEvent::ControllerCastsSpell (replay_harness.rs); (2) build_state_from_init now patches ps.poison_counters from initial_state (replay_harness.rs). Both fixes were applied before generating this corrected script.

disputes.description: Harness gap: replay_harness.rs enrich_spec_from_def did not wire TriggerCondition::WheneverYouCastSpell from AbilityDefinition::Triggered entries. RESOLVED: WheneverYouCastSpell case added to enrich_spec_from_def (replay_harness.rs line ~924).
disputes.resolution: Fixed in replay_harness.rs — WheneverYouCastSpell now wired to TriggerEvent::ControllerCastsSpell in enrich_spec_from_def.

disputes.description: Harness gap: replay_harness.rs build_state_from_init did not apply initial_state.players.pN.poison_counters to PlayerState::poison_counters. RESOLVED: ps.poison_counters = pstate.poison_counters added to the initial-state setup loop.
disputes.resolution: Fixed in replay_harness.rs — poison_counters now patched from initial_state in build_state_from_init.

script.step_note: P1 casts Lightning Bolt targeting P2. Inexorable Tide triggers (WheneverYouCastSpell, CR 603.2) and stacks above Lightning Bolt. Proliferate resolves first — P2 gains a poison counter. Then Lightning Bolt resolves dealing 3 damage to P2.

actions.description: Initial: Inexorable Tide on P1 battlefield; Lightning Bolt in P1 hand; P2 at 40 life with 1 poison counter; stack empty
actions.note: CR 701.34b: P2 has 1 poison counter — eligible for Proliferate. Inexorable Tide is on P1's battlefield ready to trigger.

CR 601.2: P1 announces Lightning Bolt, chooses P2 as target, pays {R} from pool. CR 603.2: As Lightning Bolt is cast, Inexorable Tide's WheneverYouCastSpell trigger becomes pending. CR 603.3: After spell is placed on stack, triggered ability is placed on stack above it (LIFO, CR 405.5).

actions.description: After cast: stack has 2 items (Lightning Bolt at bottom, Proliferate trigger at top); P1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 403.4 / CR 405.5: Lightning Bolt is on the stack; Inexorable Tide's Proliferate trigger was added immediately above it (LIFO). Stack count = 2.

CR 116.3: All players pass priority. Top of stack (Proliferate trigger from Inexorable Tide) resolves. CR 701.34a: Engine auto-selects all eligible targets — P2 (1 poison counter) is chosen; P2 receives 1 additional poison counter (1→2). No permanents have counters in this scenario.

actions.description: After Proliferate resolves: P2 has 2 poison counters; stack has 1 item (Lightning Bolt); P2 still at 40 life
actions.note: CR 701.34a: Proliferate gave P2 one additional poison counter (1→2). Lightning Bolt has not resolved yet — P2 life unchanged at 40.
CR 116.3: All players pass priority. Lightning Bolt (now top of stack) resolves. CR 608.2a: Lightning Bolt's effect deals 3 damage to P2 (target is still legal). P2 life: 40→37.

actions.description: Final: stack empty; P2 at 37 life with 2 poison counters; Lightning Bolt in P1 graveyard; Inexorable Tide still on P1 battlefield
actions.note: CR 608.2b: Lightning Bolt placed in P1's graveyard after resolution. P2 has 2 poison counters (1 from before + 1 from Proliferate per CR 701.34a) and 37 life (40 - 3 from Lightning Bolt per CR 120.3). Inexorable Tide remains on battlefield as a static enchantment.
